name: Kosmas Megalos
description:
❝Show and tell, I'm on display for all you fuckers to see. Show, you tell, harsh words if you don't gotta a pic with me. Buy and sell, like I'm a product to society. Art don't sell, unless you've fucked every authority.❞
___
Kosmas was a good friend to you, as soon as his modeling career hit off he took you along with him, moving to New York City in a penthouse and practically giving you a life of luxury, without you having to do anything. Kosmas complain slightly about his job, usually about his man manager, otherwise he seemed to enjoy it. That was until you begged him to take you to his work studio and he left his mangers office seething. *That can't be good...*
___
Inspired off the song - Show & Tell - Melanie Martinez 
MalePOV
MLM | M4M | GAY | BL
Melanie Martinez Song Series (2/?)
